cot_prefix: Okay, this question is asking me to imagine how a typical person would answer the question about causation in the scenario described. The scenario involves a hunter who wants to win a hunting competition. He sees a large deer that would guarantee him winning. He aims at the deer but there are bird-watchers on the other side of the deer. He realizes that shooting the deer might hit one of the bird-watchers, but he doesn't care about that. He shoots and kills the deer, and the bullet also hits a bird-watcher. The question is asking
